engineIntelligence.h2: Chrysler Concorde Engines - Codes, Common Failures & Replacement Costs
engineIntelligence.description: The cards below cover the main engines fitted to the Chrysler Concorde in the UK, including documented failure causes, variant production years, and typical rebuilt engine costs based on current UK market data.

cards.altText: Chrysler Concorde EER engine - petrol 2.7L replacement UK
knownFailures: Oil sludge accumulation - narrow oil galleries cause starvation and catastrophic timing chain failure.
Timing chain snap - secondary effect of sludge, leading to complete engine destruction.

cards.altText: Chrysler Concorde EGG engine - petrol 3.5L replacement UK
knownFailures: Timing chain guide wear - plastic guides degrade at higher mileage, causing startup rattle.
Head gasket failure - localized overheating due to coolant system degradation.

cards.altText: Chrysler Concorde JNA engine - petrol 3.2L replacement UK
knownFailures: Intake manifold gasket leaks - factory gaskets degrade, causing vacuum leaks and rough idling.
Minor oil consumption - typical wear on higher-mileage units past 80,000 miles.

commonProblems.h2: Chrysler Concorde Engine Problems - What It Costs to Fix & When Replacement Makes Sense
commonProblems.h3: The Chrysler Concorde is predominantly affected by issues within its 2.7L EER and 3.5L EGG/EGJ engine families, particularly concerning oiling and timing systems. Every rebuilt engine supplied through EngineMarket includes upgraded internal components designed to address the original failure point - plus a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty.

problems.group: Chrysler Concorde 2.7L Oil Sludge & Timing Chain Failure
problems.h4: Chrysler Concorde 2.7L Oil Sludge & Timing Chain Failure - Why EER Engines Fail Prematurely
problems.affectedModels: Chrysler Concorde LX, LXi, Limited (1998-2004, EER)
problems.rootCause: Narrow oil galleries and delayed oil changes cause sludge, starving the timing chain tensioner of lubrication.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replacing chain, guides, and tensioners before catastrophic failure.
repairOptions.longevity: Viable only if caught early; does not fix underlying sludge.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply and fit of a reconditioned unit with upgraded oil galleries.
repairOptions.longevity: Permanent solution; restores reliability with 12-month warranty.

problems.recommendation: If oil sludge is confirmed, a full rebuilt replacement is vastly superior to a repair. Piecemeal fixes will not resolve the fundamental design flaw in the EER block.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt EER engine prices for your Chrysler Concorde

problems.group: Chrysler Concorde 3.5L Overheating & Head Gasket Failure
problems.h4: Chrysler Concorde 3.5L Overheating & Head Gasket Failure - Cooling System Weaknesses
problems.rootCause: Coolant degradation and plastic thermostat housing cracks lead to localized overheating and head gasket blowout.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Removing the cylinder head, machining, and fitting new gaskets.
repairOptions.longevity: Suitable only if the block and head are not warped by heat.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply and fit of a fully remanufactured 3.5L V6 unit.
repairOptions.longevity: Recommended for premium Limited models to ensure longevity.

problems.recommendation: For a high-value Limited model, investing in a remanufactured 3.5L engine ensures factory-spec longevity and prevents recurrent overheating issues.
problems.cta: Get quotes for Chrysler Concorde 3.5L engine replacement

problems.group: Chrysler Concorde 3.2L Intake Manifold & Gasket Leaks
problems.h4: Chrysler Concorde 3.2L Intake Manifold & Gasket Leaks - Vacuum and Idle Issues
problems.rootCause: Factory intake manifold gaskets degrade over time, causing vacuum leaks, rough idling, and check engine lights.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Removing the upper intake manifold and fitting updated gaskets.
repairOptions.longevity: Highly cost-effective if the engine block is otherwise healthy.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply and fit of a reconditioned 3.2L unit.
repairOptions.longevity: Only necessary if neglect has led to secondary internal damage.

problems.recommendation: A gasket repair is the most logical first step for the 3.2L engine. It is a straightforward, affordable fix that restores smooth running without needing a full engine swap.
problems.cta: Find reconditioned JNA engine options for your Chrysler Concorde

problems.group: Chrysler Concorde First-Gen 3.3L Coolant Crossover Leaks
problems.h4: Chrysler Concorde First-Gen 3.3L Coolant Crossover Leaks - Internal Mixing
problems.rootCause: The internal coolant crossover passage in the plastic intake manifold degrades, allowing coolant to mix with the engine oil.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replacing the intake manifold with an updated, metal-reinforced version.
repairOptions.longevity: Effective fix if caught before severe bearing corrosion occurs.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply and fit of a clean, rebuilt first-generation 3.3L engine.
repairOptions.longevity: Safest route for high-mileage first-gen models to guarantee reliability.

problems.recommendation: Given the age of first-generation models, sourcing a clean, rebuilt EGA engine is often more economical and reliable than attempting complex internal repairs on a corroded block.
problems.cta: Compare prices for Chrysler Concorde 3.3L engine replacement

finalCta.h4: Don't Let Engine Failure Write Off Your Chrysler Concorde
finalCta.paragraph: Engine failure does not have to mean the end of your vehicle. EngineMarket makes it simple to compare prices from trusted UK Chrysler Concorde specialists, ensuring you get a fair deal without the main dealer premium. Every replacement engine features upgraded components addressing the original factory flaws, backed by a comprehensive 12-month warranty and nationwide delivery.
finalCta.buttonText: Compare Chrysler Concorde Engine Replacement Prices Now →
finalCta.disclaimer: All prices are indicative UK market ranges based on historical quote data and repair requests from our network of engine specialists. Dealer pricing is estimated based on published main dealer labour rates and genuine OEM parts pricing. Specialist pricing reflects actual quote data from EngineMarket’s UK network. Actual costs vary depending on damage severity, vehicle condition, variant, and workshop location within the UK. Use our free comparison tool to get tailored quotes for your specific Chrysler Concorde and engine code. Every engine supplied through EngineMarket carries a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty - always confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier.

engineSizes.h2: Chrysler Concorde Engines by Size - Find the Right Displacement for Your Variant
engineSizes.intro: Every displacement fitted to the Chrysler Concorde is listed below, with compatible engine codes, production years, and common failure notes.

items.title: Chrysler Concorde 2.7L Petrol Engines
items.description: Introduced in 1998, the 2.7L V6 became the most common Concorde engine, powering the LX, LXi, and Limited trims. While offering adequate power, its narrow oiling galleries make it highly susceptible to sludge buildup if maintenance is delayed.
commonFailurePoints: Oil sludge accumulation leading to timing chain starvation
items.cta: Compare Chrysler Concorde 2.7L petrol engine prices

items.title: Chrysler Concorde 3.2L Petrol Engines
items.description: A refined, mid-range V6 designed to bridge the gap between the problematic 2.7L and the larger 3.5L. It provides smoother operation and better long-term reliability, making it a sought-after replacement for budget-conscious owners.
commonFailurePoints: Intake manifold gasket degradation causing vacuum leaks
items.cta: Compare Chrysler Concorde 3.2L petrol engine prices

items.title: Chrysler Concorde 3.3L Petrol Engines
items.description: The original workhorse engine for the first-generation Chrysler Concorde. Known for its simple, robust pushrod design, it is less powerful than later iterations but highly durable and easier to maintain.
commonFailurePoints: Internal coolant crossover leaks in the intake manifold
items.cta: Compare Chrysler Concorde 3.3L petrol engine prices

items.title: Chrysler Concorde 3.5L Petrol Engines
items.description: The flagship powerplant for the Concorde range, available in standard and High Output (HO) formats. It delivers strong acceleration and is the preferred upgrade or replacement for owners of premium LXi and Limited models.
commonFailurePoints: head gasket failure due to overheating.
items.cta: Compare Chrysler Concorde 3.5L petrol engine prices

faq.h2: Chrysler Concorde Engine Replacement - Frequently Asked Questions

items.question: How much does a Chrysler Concorde engine replacement cost in the UK?
items.answer: A Chrysler Concorde engine replacement typically costs between £1,500 and £3,500 in the UK market. This price range depends heavily on your specific engine code, the chosen condition of the unit, and whether you require a supply-only option or a complete supply-and-fit package. Budget-friendly used options start lower, while premium remanufactured 3.5L units reach the higher end of this spectrum.
keyPoints: 2.7L EER rebuilt engines start around £1,500 (supply only).
3.5L V6 remanufactured units can reach £3,500.
Supply and fit adds approximately £600 to £1,200 in labour.
items.cta: Get a free, no-obligation Chrysler Concorde engine quote today

items.question: What is the most common engine failure in a Chrysler Concorde?
items.answer: The most common failure is oil sludge accumulation in the 2.7L EER V6 engine, which starves the timing chain of oil and leads to catastrophic snapping. This affects 1998-2004 models predominantly and is caused by narrow oiling galleries and infrequent oil changes.
keyPoints: Affects 1998-2004 models predominantly.
Caused by narrow oiling galleries and infrequent oil changes.
Results in complete engine seizure or valve damage.
items.cta: Compare rebuilt 2.7L EER engine prices for your Chrysler Concorde

items.question: Can I get a Chrysler Concorde engine supply and fit service?
items.answer: Yes, our network includes vetted, specialist UK garages experienced in fitting American V6 engines, offering a complete hassle-free solution. Mainstream garages often refuse American-spec vehicles, making our specialist network essential.
keyPoints: Mainstream garages often refuse American-spec vehicles.
Our partners are specifically trained on Chrysler V6 architectures.
The service includes ECU compatibility checks and fluid top-ups.
items.cta: Book your Chrysler Concorde engine supply and fit service now

items.question: Are rebuilt Chrysler Concorde engines reliable?
items.answer: Yes, rebuilt Chrysler Concorde engines are highly reliable, often exceeding original factory durability due to the remediation of known design flaws during the rebuild process.
keyPoints: Rebuilt 2.7L units feature upgraded oiling galleries.
New timing chains, guides, and tensioners are installed.
All units undergo rigorous compression and leak-down testing.
items.cta: View refurbished and rebuilt Chrysler Concorde engine options

items.question: How long does a Chrysler Concorde engine replacement take?
items.answer: Once the engine is sourced, the physical supply and fit process typically takes 1 to 3 days, depending on the specialist garage's schedule. Sourcing a specific engine code may take 2-5 days.
keyPoints: Sourcing a specific engine code may take 2-5 days.
UK-wide courier delivery is rapid and tracked.
Complex swaps may require slight ECU adaptations.
items.cta: Find rapid turnaround Chrysler Concorde engine replacement deals

items.question: Do Chrysler Concorde replacement engines come with a warranty?
items.answer: Yes, every engine supplied through our network includes a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty covering both parts and labour.
keyPoints: Protects your investment against future manufacturing defects.
Premium trims often qualify for extended warranty options.
Warranty is valid at any of our approved specialist fitting centres.
items.cta: Compare Chrysler Concorde engine prices with full warranty included

items.question: Can I replace my 2.7L Concorde engine with a 3.5L?
items.answer: While physically possible, upgrading from a 2.7L to a 3.5L requires ECU reprogramming, wiring harness modifications, and potentially a transmission swap.
keyPoints: The 3.5L is heavier and requires specific engine mounts.
Transmission shift points must be recalibrated for the HO variant.
Our specialist network can advise on feasibility and costs.
items.cta: Speak to our Chrysler Concorde engine specialists for upgrade advice

items.question: How do I find the correct engine code for my Chrysler Concorde?
items.answer: You can find your engine code by checking the 8th digit of your Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) or looking at the stamping on the engine block itself.
keyPoints: VIN digit 'R' indicates the 2.7L EER engine.
VIN digit 'J' indicates the 3.2L JNA engine.
VIN digit 'G' indicates the 3.5L EGG/EGJ engine.
items.cta: Enter your reg to instantly verify your Chrysler Concorde engine code

items.question: Is it worth replacing the engine in an older Chrysler Concorde?
items.answer: Yes, if the bodywork, transmission, and interior are in good condition, a warrantied replacement engine is a highly cost-effective way to extend the vehicle's life by years.
keyPoints: Cheaper than purchasing a new vehicle outright.
Rebuilt engines reset the mileage clock on the powertrain.
Maintains the unique driving dynamics of the LH platform.
items.cta: Check if your Chrysler Concorde engine replacement is economically viable

items.question: Where can I buy a used Chrysler Concorde engine near me?
items.answer: While local physical stock is rare, our UK-wide network and courier service can deliver a thoroughly tested, warrantied used engine directly to your chosen specialist garage.
keyPoints: We aggregate stock from national American car specialists.
All used engines undergo strict compression and oil analysis.
Nationwide delivery ensures you get the best price, not just the closest.
